name: indie-founder-lenses
description: Phase-aware, read-only diagnostic skills for the surfaces a solo founder lives on — launch readiness, pricing, landing-page conversion, and founder focus. Each lens skill is an independent critic that detects its own phase and reports a structured finding against an artifact you can act on. This is NOT a loop and NOT a methodology: there is no orchestrator, no shared lifecycle, and no founder persona — the lens skills share only a small surface-vocabulary doc and auto-route (or are invoked) on their own.
